facebook.caption: 971 reviews. Every single one is 5 stars. Vietnam Explorer PADI Dive Center in Phú Quốc isn't a fluke. This is the dive shop locals and expats keep sending people to. PADI certified, English-speaking instructors, and access to some of the clearest water around the island. First-time diver or already certified? They run both. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 5.0 stars across 971 reviews. Watch what happens when you get underwater at Phú Quốc with Vietnam Explorer PADI Dive Center. Coral, visibility, and zero crowds. This is what the rating is about.
